title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・立ちはだかる鬼姉

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho comes to an end with a
cascade of cheers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek puts on an incredible race, leaving a
strong impression on Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite losing, her intimidating aura shakes
Tamamo Cross to her core.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross witnesses Super Creek race with a
seriousness she's never seen before...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then realizes that Super Creek has finally
found her own reason to run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap awaits Super Creek at her next race,
the autumn Tenno Sho.
